settings.question: Where do you ship from?
settings.answer: All our products ship from USA-based warehouses. Most orders arrive within 3–8 business days depending on your location.

settings.question: How much does shipping cost?
settings.answer: Standard shipping is $5.99 and takes 3–8 business days. Free shipping is available on all orders over $35.

settings.question: Can I return a product?
settings.answer: Yes — we accept returns within 30 days of delivery for unused items in their original condition and packaging. Personalized items cannot be returned unless damaged or incorrect. To start a return, contact us at support@velnorapets.com.

settings.question: What if my item arrives damaged or incorrect?
settings.answer: Please contact us within 7 days of delivery with your order number and photos. We will make it right at no cost to you.

settings.question: How long do refunds take?
settings.answer: Approved refunds are processed to your original payment method within 5–10 business days after we receive and inspect the returned item.

settings.question: Are your products safe for pets?
settings.answer: Yes — every product we carry is tested for pet safety. We only stock non-toxic, pet-safe materials from verified suppliers.
